vocab.example: 他头顶上顶着一个大西瓜。
鲸鱼浮出水面呼吸空气。
鲸鱼喷出的水柱非常壮观。
蛋糕外面涂了一层厚厚的奶油。
冬天，地上积了一层厚厚的雪。
深海里有很多神秘的生物。
浅海处适合游泳和浮潜。
如果不浇水，这棵花会死掉。
我大概需要一个小时完成作业。
海浪一波接一波地拍打着沙滩。
听到获奖的消息，他激动地跳了起来。
蓝鲸是一种体型巨大的动物。
随着科学的发展，生活越来越便利。
同学们依依不舍地告别了老师。
魔术师的手一挥，硬币就消失了。

sentences.text: 鲸鱼浮出水面，喷出高高的水柱。
sentences.description: A whale emerging and spraying water.

sentences.text: 蓝鲸是世界上最大的动物，身体非常巨大。
sentences.description: The blue whale is a massive animal.

sentences.text: 随着音乐的响起，大家激动地跳起舞来。
我们依依不舍地告别了朋友，踏上了归途。
渐渐地，那只小船在海面上消失了。
sentences.description: A small boat vanishing gradually on the sea.

头顶.zh: 烈日当空，头顶的太阳晒得皮肤发疼。
头顶.en: Strong sun overhead, the sun above my head burned my skin painfully.

头顶.zh: 一鸟飞过，停在了他的头顶上。
头顶.en: A bird flew past and perched on top of his head.

头顶.zh: 请注意头顶安全，防止高空落物。
头顶.en: Please pay attention to overhead safety to prevent falling objects.

头顶.zh: 抬头看，头顶是一片蓝天白云。
头顶.en: Look up, above our head is blue sky and white clouds.
Wear the hat atop your head for sun protection.

浮出.zh: 潜水员缓缓从水底浮出水面。
浮出.en: The diver slowly surfaced out of the water from the bottom.

浮出.zh: 鲸鱼隔一段时间就要浮出水面呼吸。
浮出.en: Whales need to surface out of water at intervals to breathe.

浮出.zh: 经过调查，事情的真相终于浮出水面。
浮出.en: After investigation, the truth of the matter finally surfaced.

浮出.zh: 小鱼纷纷浮出水面吐泡泡。
浮出.en: Small fish surfaced one after another to blow bubbles.

浮出.zh: 冰山在海面上浮出了巨大的一角。
浮出.en: The iceberg surfaced a huge tip above sea level.

水柱.zh: 喷泉喷出了高达十米的水柱。
水柱.en: The fountain shot out a water column as high as ten meters.

水柱.zh: 鲸鱼换气时会喷出强烈的水柱。
水柱.en: Whales shoot out strong water columns when blowing air.

水柱.zh: 消防员用高压水柱扑灭了大火。
水柱.en: Firefighters extinguished the large fire using high-pressure water jets.

水柱.zh: 巨大的水柱从破损的水管冲天而起。
水柱.en: A huge water column rushed skyward from the damaged pipe.

水柱.zh: 水柱在阳光照射下形成了绚丽的彩虹。
水柱.en: The water column formed a gorgeous rainbow under sunlight illumination.

层.zh: 这栋大楼一共有二十六层。
层.en: This building has twenty-six floors in total.

层.zh: 蛋糕上面涂了厚厚的一层奶油。
层.en: A thick layer of cream was spread over the cake.

层.zh: 经过努力，他的学习成绩更上一层楼。
层.en: Through effort, his academic performance scaled a higher level.

层.zh: 桌子上落满了一层薄薄的灰尘。
层.en: The table was covered with a thin layer of dust.

层.zh: 剥开一层又一层的包装纸。
层.en: Peel open layer upon layer of wrapping paper.

厚厚.zh: 冬天到了，地上积了厚厚的一层雪。
厚厚.en: Winter has arrived, and a thick layer of snow accumulated on the ground.

厚厚.zh: 天冷了，妈妈让我穿上厚厚的羽绒服。
厚厚.en: It's cold; Mom asked me to put on a thick down jacket.

厚厚.zh: 桌子上放着一本厚厚的字典。
厚厚.en: A thick dictionary lay on the table.

厚厚.zh: 墙上挂着厚厚的窗帘遮挡阳光。
厚厚.en: Thick curtains hung on the wall to block out sunlight.

厚厚.zh: 踩在厚厚的地毯上感觉非常舒适。
厚厚.en: Stepping on a thick carpet feels very comfortable.

公斤.zh: 这袋大米的重量是十公斤。
公斤.en: The weight of this bag of rice is ten kilograms.

公斤.zh: 医生建议他每天增加一公斤的运动负荷。
公斤.en: The doctor suggested he increase daily exercise load by one kilogram.

公斤.zh: 妈妈在菜市场买了三公斤苹果。
公斤.en: Mom bought three kilograms of apples at the food market.

公斤.zh: 乘坐飞机时行李不能超过规定公斤数。
公斤.en: Luggage cannot exceed specified kilograms when flying.

公斤.zh: 经过一个月锻炼，他成功减轻了两公斤。
公斤.en: After a month of exercise, he successfully reduced two kilograms.

深海.zh: 深海里生活着许多稀奇古怪的生物。
深海.en: Many strange and bizarre creatures live in the deep sea.

深海.zh: 潜水艇可以潜入数千米的深海探险。
深海.en: Submarines can submerge into deep sea thousands of meters deep for exploration.
The deep sea world is dark and mysterious.

深海.zh: 科学家正在研究深海生态环境。
深海.en: Scientists are studying the deep sea ecological environment.

深海.zh: 强烈的海水压力是深海探测的难题。
深海.en: Intense seawater pressure is a difficult problem in deep sea exploration.

浅海.zh: 许多小鱼和小虾喜欢生活在浅海区域。
浅海.en: Many small fish and shrimps like living in shallow sea areas.

浅海.zh: 游客们在安全的浅海里游泳玩耍。
浅海.en: Tourists swim and play in the safe shallow waters.

浅海.zh: 浅海地区阳光充足，适合珊瑚生长。
浅海.en: Shallow sea areas have ample sunlight, suitable for coral growth.

浅海.zh: 退潮后，浅海摊上留下了许多贝壳。
浅海.en: After the tide ebbed, many shells were left on the shallow sea beach.
This shallow sea area is crystal clear to the bottom.

死掉.zh: 如果长期不浇水，植物就会死掉。
死掉.en: If left unwatered for long, plants will die off.

死掉.zh: 养在水缸里的小金鱼不小心死掉了。
死掉.en: The little goldfish raised in the tank accidentally died.

死掉.zh: 及时救治受伤的小鸟，防止它死掉。
死掉.en: Treat the injured bird promptly to prevent it from dying off.

死掉.zh: 严寒的冬季导致许多害虫死掉。
死掉.en: Severe winter cold causes many pest insects to die off.

死掉.zh: 看到树苗死掉，大家感到很可惜。
死掉.en: Seeing the sapling die off, everyone felt it was a pity.

大概.zh: 我大概需要半个小时才能完成作业。
大概.en: I probably need about half an hour to complete the homework.

大概.zh: 他大概还不知道这个消息吧。
大概.en: He probably doesn't know this news yet, right?

大概.zh: 这篇文章的大概意思是倡导环保。
大概.en: The rough idea of this article is advocating environmental protection.

大概.zh: 参加这次活动的同学大概有五十人。
大概.en: Students attending this activity number roughly around fifty.

大概.zh: 了解事情的大概经过后，他做出了判断。
大概.en: After understanding the general course of events, he made a judgment.

盖.zh: 睡觉时要盖好被子，小心着凉。
盖.en: Cover yourself well with the quilt while sleeping, be careful not to catch cold.

盖.zh: 城市里盖起了许许多多的高楼大厦。
盖.en: Many high-rise buildings were built in the city.

盖.zh: 请把汤锅的盖子盖严实。
盖.en: Please cover the soup pot lid tightly.

盖.zh: 文件上盖了一个红色的印章。
盖.en: A red official stamp was stamped on the document.
Heavy snow covered the entire mountain.

载.zh: 这辆卡车可以载满重达数吨的货物。
载.en: This truck can carry a full load of goods weighing several tons.

载.zh: 校车每天负责安全接载学生上下学。
载.en: The school bus is responsible for safely carrying students to and from school daily.

载.zh: 满载而归的渔船缓缓靠岸。
载.en: The fishing boat returning fully loaded slowly berthed.

载.zh: 这艘轮船最大能够载客一千人。
载.en: This vessel can carry a maximum of one thousand passengers.

载.zh: 载着梦想的飞船升上了太空。
载.en: The spacecraft carrying dreams ascended into space.

波.zh: 微风吹过，湖面荡起一阵阵波浪。
波.en: A gentle breeze blew past, and waves rippled across the lake surface.

波.zh: 新一波的冷空气即将来袭。
波.en: A new wave of cold air is coming soon.

波.zh: 随手扔下一块石头，水面泛起了微波。
波.en: Tossing a stone casually, subtle waves rippled on the water surface.

波.zh: 电波将信号传送到世界各地。
波.en: Radio waves transmit signals to all parts of the world.

波.zh: 这一波人潮涌进了展览馆。
波.en: This wave of crowd surged into the exhibition hall.

激动.zh: 听到自己获奖的消息，他激动得流下了眼泪。
激动.en: Hearing the news that he won an award, he wept with excitement.

激动.zh: 比赛进入决胜阶段，观众们十分激动。
激动.en: The match reached deciding stages, and the audience was extremely excited.

激动.zh: 请控制好情绪，不要太激动。
激动.en: Please control your emotions and don't be overly excited.

激动.zh: 队员们拥抱在一起，庆祝激动的时刻。
激动.en: Team members hugged together, celebrating the exciting moment.

激动.zh: 激动的心情久久不能平静下来。
激动.en: Excited emotions could not calm down for a long time.

渐渐.zh: 太阳落山了，天色渐渐暗了下来。
渐渐.en: The sun set, and the sky gradually darkened.

渐渐.zh: 经过一段时间适应，他渐渐喜欢上了新环境。
渐渐.en: After adapting for a period, he gradually grew fond of the new environment.

渐渐.zh: 雨过天晴，天空渐渐放晴了。
渐渐.en: Rain passed and sun shone, sky gradually cleared up.

渐渐.zh: 随着时间的推移，伤口渐渐痊愈了。
渐渐.en: With the passage of time, the wound gradually healed.

渐渐.zh: 远去的火车渐渐消失在视线中。
渐渐.en: The departing train gradually vanished from line of sight.

巨大.zh: 广场上立着一座巨大的雕像。
巨大.en: A huge statue stands in the plaza.

巨大.zh: 这项发明对人类社会产生了巨大的影响。
巨大.en: This invention produced a huge impact on human society.

巨大.zh: 面对巨大的压力，他依然没有放弃。
巨大.en: Facing huge pressure, he still did not give up.

巨大.zh: 救援人员克服了巨大的困难完成了任务。
巨大.en: Rescue personnel overcome huge difficulties to complete the task.

巨大.zh: 现场发出了巨大的爆炸声响。
巨大.en: A huge explosion sound echoed at the site.

随着.zh: 随着音乐的节奏，大家翩翩起舞。
随着.en: Following the rhythm of the music, everyone danced lightly.

随着.zh: 随着科技的发展，人们的生活越来越便利。
随着.en: Along with the development of technology, people's lives are increasingly convenient.

随着.zh: 随着气温升高，冰雪开始融化。
随着.en: As temperatures rise, ice and snow begin to melt.

随着.zh: 随着年龄增长，我们要学会承担责任。
随着.en: As age grows, we need to learn to bear responsibility.

随着.zh: 随着一声令下，比赛正式开始。
随着.en: Along with the order given, the game officially began.

依依不舍.zh: 毕业时，同学们依依不舍地互相道别。
依依不舍.en: Upon graduation, classmates reluctantly bade farewell to each other.

依依不舍.zh: 假期结束了，我依依不舍地离开了老家。
依依不舍.en: The vacation ended, and I reluctantly left my hometown.

依依不舍.zh: 看着父母远去的背影，她眼中充满了依依不舍。
依依不舍.en: Watching her parents' departing figures, her eyes were filled with reluctance.

依依不舍.zh: 大家依依不舍地挥手向老师告别。
依依不舍.en: Everyone reluctantly waved goodbye to the teacher.

依依不舍.zh: 欢快的时光总是让人感到依依不舍。
依依不舍.en: Joyful times always make people feel reluctant to part.

消失.zh: 太阳落山后，霞光渐渐消失在天边。
消失.en: After the sun set, glowing clouds gradually vanished over the horizon.

消失.zh: 魔法师的手帕在众目睽睽下消失了。
消失.en: The magician's handkerchief vanished under everyone's gaze.

消失.zh: 随着误会解开，心中的顾虑完全消失了。
消失.en: As the misunderstanding was resolved, inner misgivings vanished completely.

消失.zh: 恐龙在数千万年前就从地球上消失了。
消失.en: Dinosaurs vanished from the earth tens of millions of years ago.

消失.zh: 欢呼声渐渐弱下去，最终完全消失。
消失.en: Cheers faded gradually, ultimately vanishing completely.
